'''thazono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadlet|roadlet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadlet|roadlet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thazono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæzeneth|thæzeneth]] || [[word:thæzenej|thæzenej]] || [[word:thæzenesh|thæzenesh]] || [[word:thæzene|thæzene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazozonoth|thazozonoth]] || [[word:thazozonoj|thazozonoj]] || [[word:thazozonosh|thazozonosh]] || [[word:thazozono|thazozono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazonoth|thazonoth]] || [[word:thazonoj|thazonoj]] || [[word:thazonosh|thazonosh]] || [[word:thazono|thazono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazofnoth|thazofnoth]] || [[word:thazofnoj|thazofnoj]] || [[word:thazofnosh|thazofnosh]] || [[word:thazofnof|thazofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thazonotho|thazonotho]] || [[word:thazonojo|thazonojo]] || [[word:thazonosho|thazonosho]] || [[word:thazonoko|thazonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thazonoth|thazonoth]] || [[word:thazonoj|thazonoj]] || [[word:thazonosh|thazonosh]] || [[word:thazono|thazono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thazonothol|thazonothol]] || [[word:thazonojol|thazonojol]] || [[word:thazonoshol|thazonoshol]] || [[word:thazonokol|thazonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thazonothotho|thazonothotho]] || [[word:thazonojojo|thazonojojo]] || [[word:thazonoshosho|thazonoshosho]] || [[word:thazonoko|thazonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thazonothon|thazonothon]] || [[word:thazonojon|thazonojon]] || [[word:thazonoshon|thazonoshon]] || [[word:thazonokon|thazonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thazonothoro|thazonothoro]] || [[word:thazonojoro|thazonojoro]] || [[word:thazonoshoro|thazonoshoro]] || [[word:thazonokoro|thazonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
